column78: bossComment
Everything shines bright if you polish it right.
It's a beautiful sunny day. I can't possibly lose!
Hi, I'm Metabok. No-sugar diets are the way to go!
Heh heh... I'm the spirit of all those little worries people have.
Hyaaah! Haaah! I'll gobble you up!
Whatcha lookin' at? Huh? I'm gonna peck you!
Wanna take a bite out of me?
Whee! Rolling into a ball always makes me feel better.
Alpacavalier, on the scene! Let the real adventure begin!
At last, a worthy opponent. I commend you for coming this far.
These are pincers, not horns. Pincers, y'hear? Don't get it wrong!
Just ignore the moss, I'm still good!
Hyahahaha! Now yer gonna get it!
Hnraaargh! I'll send you flying!
I'll flatten you! Take this!
I need food for my metamorphosis. Don't get in my way!
I'm no weed, I'm a proud warrior of the plant world!
Don't eat me, I taste terrible!
Welcome, welcome... Watch out for my branches!
In this kingdom, broccoli boils YOU!
Whoa, I wasn't expecting you so soon! I'm shaken to my core!
Let's see which one of us cracks first!
How dare you treat my son like a common weed. I'll teach you a lesson!
I need food for my metamorphosis. Don't get in my way!
Bzzz... Bzz-zzz, bzzzzzz!
I knew this day would come. Awright, step right up for a poundin'!
I'm stuck with this wooden smile but inside I'm boiling with rage!
I finally hatched from my chrysalis! Now I'm way stronger than before!
I've only got 30 years left on the mortgage for this carapace!
We're not barnacles, all right?!
My horn's perfect for making shish kebabs...and for fighting too!
You'll never beat my lustrous sheen and healthy roots!
Hello, hello! No time to talk, let's fight!
I am Granitron. All will crumble in face of my might!
Which one of us is stronger, huh? I bet it's me!
I've been practicing how to walk forwards!
You'll never beat me. Come at me!
I wasn't glaring at you, I always look like this!
One minute I'm a rock, the next I'm a monster! Bwahaha!
Let's get this started. I've been waiting for a chance to smash you up!
Check out my new grass wig - pretty spiffy, right?
What I'm going to do now may make you uncomfortable.
Want a coconut? They're delicious, and hurt like hell when aimed right!
Thanks for playing with my son. Now it's my turn to pulverize ya!
Raaaaargh! Time to slice and dice!
Yarrr, come join us down below in Davy Jones' locker!
Boy howdy, I love the desert! I've been livin' here 66 years.
Something about your face really makes me wanna sting you!
O, foolish mortal, wandering into my lair, prepare to face your doom!
Yowch, I got pricked by one of my own needles! What, you think that's funny?
It's my turn! Let's make this a good battle!
Rargh! At last... I've been itching for a fight!
You've got guts stepping into my territory!
I stayed in the sun too long... Water... Water...!
I need some more bandages! You got any?
I've been in the desert for 99 years. I love it here!
Slooow riiiide! Yeeep! Thaaat's meee!
Blast it, you saw through my disguise! Get ready to be dragged down to the depths!
All I want is a strong opponent! Think you can keep me amused?
Ho ho ho! Beware - a beautiful flower has thorns!
This desert is my domain. It'll swallow you whole!
Hop! Hoppity hop!
Whoo, sure is a cold one today. I feel like I could freeze!
The rage of all living things courses through me!
I hide underneath the frost and snow for moments like this!
You hit me! You actually hit me! That wasn't very n-ice!
Quit it, I'm not a bad monster! I'm just a little misunderstood...
I just turned 300 the other day. I'm not about to die now!
I've been waiting for you! You'll never be the same after this battle!
I'm just a regular igloo. Trust me, crawl right in and relax.
I'm so lonely...I just want a little company, that's all!
Sup! Shall we dance?
I'm so cold, I just want to go to bed. Let's get this over with!
You've done well to make it this far. But your lucky streak ends here!
Croak, croak. Croooooooooak!
Have we met before...? Could we have been lovers in a past life? Yeah, right!
Sink into the swamp and get ready to party!
You spotted me? N-n-no way!
Hee hee hee... I just love the shape of your heads!
I'm up? I'm up! Geez, I'm sooo nervous!
Hi, hi, hi! I'll show you how awesome a slime can be!
I'm made of only the purest mineral water!
I'm small, but I pack a punch! Come at me anytime!
Don't be shy, get in close and enjoy my flower's fragrance!
Just try it! I'll deflect every last one of your attacks!
Whoa, a living human! I thought you were just a myth!
I'm gonna peck you where it hurts!
I'll teach you the meaning of fear and turn you into jelly!
I-if you attack my belly, I'll explode! ...Just kidding.
If you play with fire, you're gonna get burned!
I'm about to blow my top!
Owwie, I can't get out of this darned chest. Now I'm mad!
You can't hit me, I'm made of smoke!
I'll be gettin' right back to me ship after I deal with ye scurvy cur!
How'd you like to take a dip in hot, steaming magma?
I fell asleep and burned down a whole forest. I'm such a klutz!
Wow, a real, live human! My friends'll never believe this!
Who dragged me out of my magma?!
GROOOOOAR! You summon me and so I appear!
Here we are again. Get ready to suffocate!
I'll reach out and set your heart aflame!
My fiery breath will burn you to ash!
I'll give you a taste of my volcanic passion!
Burn... Burn it all...!
Boo! Aveeenge meee!
Hi, great to meet ya. And now we fight!
A battle between rulers? What a spiffing idea!

Greetings, I am Octoman,
a humble Martian tourist.
Don't underestimate me. I'm no regular panda!
Hey buddy, you're not looking too good. You'll be white as a sheet by the time I finish with you!
Yeah, hi. I got nothing to say.
Woof, woof! I'm 16 years old!
I'm full of energy since I switched to an iron-rich diet!
Oink, oink!
What a pleasure to meet another Kairo user so far from home!
How's it going? Gosh, I was worried I wouldn't get a cameo this time.
Heh heh. Soon I'll unleash my evil on the whole world!
I'm tougher than any duck you'll ever meet!
Hee hee. You shine so bright, I thought you were made of gold for a minute.
Hi! It's me, Kairobot! Ready for some training, buddy?
Make way for the Legends of Heropolis! Let's do this thing!
Things were quiet over in March to a Million, so I thought I'd drop in!
Hey, you! Don't mess this up, or I swear you'll be sorry!
Which one of us is stronger, huh? I bet it's me!

Heh heh heh... Anyone who can't be bribed deserves to be punished!
